summary: Iteration 122: Backend-only testing of Super Fascicolo Tecnico cover page and PDF generation. All 14 tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) GET /api/commesse/{commessa_id}/fascicolo-tecnico-completo returns valid multi-page PDF (200, application/pdf), (2) PDF has 18 pages, (3) Cover page contains FASCICOLO TECNICO, company name (Steel Project Design Srls), EN 1090 reference, EXC2 class, (4) Dynamic index shows '2 Certificati 3.1 Originali', (5) All 5 chapters present (Dati Generali, Riesame/ITT, Materiali/CAM, Saldatura, CE/DoP), (6) Cascade delete regression tests all pass.

elements_found: RWC signature area with name: Francesco Spano'

dynamic_index.test: Index shows certificate count when certificates exist

critical_code_review_comments: Cover template at /app/backend/templates/pdf/cover_page.html correctly renders with Jinja2-like variable replacement
Dynamic index correctly shows certificate count: '3.4 Appendice A: 2 Certificati 3.1 Originali'
PDF generator at /app/backend/services/pdf_super_fascicolo.py correctly merges all chapters and certificate PDFs
The cover page shows 'Classe di Esecuzione EXC2' from EN 1090 badge
RWC signature area properly populated with 'Francesco Spano'' name
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 tests pass for Super Fascicolo Tecnico. The endpoint generates an 18-page PDF (1.3MB) with professional cover page containing: company logo area, EN 1090 badge with EXC2 class, FASCICOLO TECNICO title, data box with commessa details, dynamic index showing 2 certificates, RWC signature area. All 5 chapters (Cap 1-5) are present. Cascade delete regression tests also pass.
